news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes adds Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) to its single stock Leveraged ETF lineup

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long COST Daily ETF (COTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST) net of fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. COTG was launched on Sep 18, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes adds Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) to its single stock Leveraged ETF lineup
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Sept. 18, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is excited to announce the launch of another new single stock leveraged ETFs, available for trading starting September 18...
